events.description: Alice ventures to forest edge to gather wood — community spirit drives her to support the forge (+7 wood) — sustainable gathering preserves ecosystem
Bob fires forge with gratitude for Alice's wood gathering — crafts 4 quality tools (+16 gold) — village gold smashes through 300!
Carol completes first bulk remedy trade with merchant caravan — 'Remedy of the Northern Spring' sells 2 batches (+12 gold) — medicine pillar celebrates first major trade
Village Gold Smashes 300! Alice's community foraging saves the forge — Carol's medicine trade flourishes. Gold 312, Wood recovering, Medicine pillar thriving!
